其實羊唔係大家稔果種純跑狗
近年好多隊 vs 多都係縮
佢拉空位同現身搶點好強
可以睇下呢篇
https://arseblog.com/2018/01/arsenal-want-aubameyang-can-offer-risky/

Either way, to put Aubameyang’s ability to get through on goal down to his pace alone is insulting. Sharp, intelligent movement in the box is truly the key and something Arsenal have not seen probably since Robin van Persie left the club. It’s regularly mentioned that a lot of his goals for Dortmund are tap-ins but he isn’t given enough credit for getting himself into such brilliant positions.

A burst of speed over the first few yards certainly helps but it’s an ability to create space for himself that sees Aubameyang score so often. Whether he’s peeling away to the back post off a defender’s shoulder, or moving towards the near post only to dart back into the space created, the so-called tap-ins are regularly earned, rather than gifted.

His height (at 6’2” he’s marginally taller than Robert Lewandowski and Edinson Cavani – not what you expect from such a quick striker)

The close control becomes an even bigger issue if he is to be used like Alexandre Lacazette or Olivier Giroud, players who hold the ball up and link play excellently. Aubameyang will be on the end of moves but hoping he can help build them is extremely optimistic and makes you wonder if he will become stuck on an island when Arsenal are struggling.

A potential partnership with Alexandre Lacazette does ease that concern. Since joining, we’ve seen that Lacazette is excellent at keeping hold of possession and bringing others into play.
Bild plus: Aub’s father convinced him to join #AFC. He is the driving force of this transfer.

https://arseblog.com/2018/01/arsenal-want-aubameyang-can-offer-risky/

Either way, to put Aubameyang’s ability to get through on goal down to his pace alone is insulting. Sharp, intelligent movement in the box is truly the key and something Arsenal have not seen probably since Robin van Persie left the club. It’s regularly mentioned that a lot of his goals for Dortmund are tap-ins but he isn’t given enough credit for getting himself into such brilliant positions.

A burst of speed over the first few yards certainly helps but it’s an ability to create space for himself that sees Aubameyang score so often. Whether he’s peeling away to the back post off a defender’s shoulder, or moving towards the near post only to dart back into the space created, the so-called tap-ins are regularly earned, rather than gifted.

His height (at 6’2” he’s marginally taller than Robert Lewandowski and Edinson Cavani – not what you expect from such a quick striker)

The close control becomes an even bigger issue if he is to be used like Alexandre Lacazette or Olivier Giroud, players who hold the ball up and link play excellently. Aubameyang will be on the end of moves but hoping he can help build them is extremely optimistic and makes you wonder if he will become stuck on an island when Arsenal are struggling.

A potential partnership with Alexandre Lacazette does ease that concern. Since joining, we’ve seen that Lacazette is excellent at keeping hold of possession and bringing others into play.

【now.com體育】對於阿仙奴主帥雲加日前不點名指某些球隊多年無冠，熱刺領隊普捷天奴作出反擊，指雲加不應談論其他球隊，反而應該專注於自己的球隊之上。

近年英超只能爭逐前4的阿仙奴，被不少敵方球迷嘲笑多年無冠，領隊雲加日前受訪時就批評傳媒的渲染，影響大眾印象：「看，己隊已打入過幾次決賽。你們傳媒的取態有改變過嗎？沒有。有些球隊已經25年沒有入過決賽，仍然得到你們吹捧；但己隊即使在過去4年贏過3次英足盃，你們都會狠批我們。」

一般相信，雲加提到無冠但受傳媒吹捧的球隊，指的是死敵熱刺及球會史上從未贏過英超冠軍的利物浦。熱刺領隊普捷天奴回應雲加的言論時表示：「我這麼年輕，而且只在英超5年時間，執教過修咸頓與熱刺；去談論其他球隊實在毫無意義。」

普帥甚至直指雲加不是：「他永遠都是世上其中一位最佳領隊，我很尊敬他；不過，我想，他需要談論的是他自己及阿仙奴。他是一位出眾的領隊，但每個人都有犯錯的時候，而我認為，他就己隊或其他球隊發表意見，那就是一個錯誤。」

普捷天奴2014年夏天離開修咸頓，出掌熱刺帥印，但目前為止尚未帶領球隊贏過任何錦標。在普帥麾下，熱刺最接近冠軍的時刻是2014/15球季的英聯盃亞軍，以及上季的英超亞軍。

【now.com體育】對於阿仙奴主帥雲加日前不點名指某些球隊多年無冠，熱刺領隊普捷天奴作出反擊，指雲加不應談論其他球隊，反而應該專注於自己的球隊之上。

近年英超只能爭逐前4的阿仙奴，被不少敵方球迷嘲笑多年無冠，領隊雲加日前受訪時就批評傳媒的渲染，影響大眾印象：「看，己隊已打入過幾次決賽。你們傳媒的取態有改變過嗎？沒有。有些球隊已經25年沒有入過決賽，仍然得到你們吹捧；但己隊即使在過去4年贏過3次英足盃，你們都會狠批我們。」

一般相信，雲加提到無冠但受傳媒吹捧的球隊，指的是死敵熱刺及球會史上從未贏過英超冠軍的利物浦。熱刺領隊普捷天奴回應雲加的言論時表示：「我這麼年輕，而且只在英超5年時間，執教過修咸頓與熱刺；去談論其他球隊實在毫無意義。」

普帥甚至直指雲加不是：「他永遠都是世上其中一位最佳領隊，我很尊敬他；不過，我想，他需要談論的是他自己及阿仙奴。他是一位出眾的領隊，但每個人都有犯錯的時候，而我認為，他就己隊或其他球隊發表意見，那就是一個錯誤。」

普捷天奴2014年夏天離開修咸頓，出掌熱刺帥印，但目前為止尚未帶領球隊贏過任何錦標。在普帥麾下，熱刺最接近冠軍的時刻是2014/15球季的英聯盃亞軍，以及上季的英超亞軍。

Negotiations between Borussia Dortmund and Arsenal over the transfer of Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang have stalled with a deal now in doubt, according to latest reports from Germany.

According to Kicker, Dortmund have grown "increasingly angry" with Arsenal's approach during negotiations with the two clubs still far apart in agreeing a fee for the Gabon international.

The Gunners have already seen two bids for Aubameyang rejected over the last week. An opening offer worth between €45m and €50m (£39m and £43.5m) with a further €5m to follow in "easily achievable bonuses" was rejected by the club last Saturday [21 January], the German publication report.

Arsenal have made a second offer since, but one that is only marginally bigger than their original bid that is still someway short of the €70m Dortmund are demanding this month.

Those offers have only served to frustrate Dortmund to the extent where Kicker suggest negotiations are now at a point where they could fail completely. With less than a week of the January transfer window left, Arsenal believe their approach will eventually force Dortmund to drop their asking price and cash in on a player who has already agreed personal terms with the Premier League side worth €10m a season.

But Dortmund are prepared to dig their heels in and hold onto the player, adamant they will not be pressured into a deal that falls short of their expectations.

The Bundesliga club are also keen to sign Olivier Giroud on loan until the end of the season as part of the arrangement – for a fee of €1.5m. But Dortmund are prepared to end that interest and retain Aubameyang unless Arsenal change their stance.

據《獨立報》報導，多蒙特主帥斯托格爾希望俱樂部能夠儘快決定奧巴美揚的去留。

　　在桑切斯離隊後，阿仙奴一直將奧巴美揚視為其替代者。此前，阿仙奴給出了4400萬英鎊的報價，但被多蒙特拒絕。據悉，多蒙特的心理價位為6000萬英鎊。距轉會視窗關閉還有不到一周的時間，阿仙奴正在努力爭取完成這筆交易。斯托格爾沒有排除奧巴美揚離開的可能。

　　據《體育圖片報》的消息，奧巴美揚的轉會將會在本周結束前敲定，轉會費用為6000萬--6500萬英鎊，奧巴美揚到阿仙奴以後，薪水將超過2000萬英鎊。

　　但據《踢球者》報導，阿仙奴過於緩慢的談判進程讓多蒙特非常不滿，不排除交易擱淺的可能。如果奧巴美揚轉會成功，基奧特會以租借的形式加盟多蒙特，租借費為150萬歐元。

　　斯托格爾說：“我們會儘快想辦法解決這個問題。無論這件事的結果如何，每個人都認為，事情越早解決對球隊越好。”
